notes: 62% reported using AI coding tools. 82% reported using them for writing code.
Among those using AI, 82% use it for writing code.
Only 43% trust AI output accuracy. Significant trust gap.
GitHub reported 1.8M paid Copilot subscribers out of ~100M devs. Plus free tier.
52% use AI assistants regularly (ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.)
37% of SWE tasks show significant AI usage based on Claude conversation analysis. Highest among all occupations.
88% augmentation (human+AI) vs 12% automation. AI supplements rather than replaces.
Extrapolated from 52-62% in 2024, ~65-70% in early 2025, growth ~10pp/year.
